name: Benchmark Annotation
short_description: Manual or LLM-assisted gold-action annotation across the three granularity levels.
detailed_description: Tags Phase 1 work that decomposes benchmark tasks into hierarchical solutions and labels gold actions at the global, subtask, and execution levels. Covers annotation schemas, inter-annotator agreement studies, and the construction of the ≥100-task annotated set required by the project's success criteria.
